resources.string: Enter one or more work chat names separated by semicolons, exactly as they appear in Telegram notifications.
DISABLE BATTERY OPTIMIZATIONS FOR THE APP
Current work chat: "%1$s".\nThe alarm will match this name.
Current work chats: %1$s.\nThe alarm will match any of them.
Current work chat: "%1$s".\nThe alarm will match it.
Current work chats: %1$s.\nThe alarm will match any of them.
How to use the work chat alarm

1) Disable battery optimizations for the app. The “Disable battery optimizations for the app” button in the Settings tab will open the correct system screen.
2) Grant the app access to Telegram notifications. Use “Open notification access settings” and enable access for Telegram Alarm.
3) Choose an alarm sound. Tap “Choose alarm sound” and select any available audio file. This sound will be played when the alarm triggers.
4) Enter the work chat name (or several names separated by semicolons) exactly as they appear in Telegram notifications. The name does not have to be complete.
5) Save the entered chat names using “Save chat names”. The app will react to any of the saved names.
6) Set a comfortable alarm volume using the volume slider.
7) Tap the cat button on the Home tab to enable tracking. When tracking is enabled, the cat glows and shows a thumbs-up.
8) To stop the alarm, use the notification on your phone: open the shade, tap the alarm notification, and press the stop action.
Developer contact: Tg @RunwayResearch
Enter the activation key you received from the app author. After successful activation, the app will start tracking work chat notifications using your settings.
Device ID: will be filled automatically
Channel for a loud alarm sound on new messages
A message arrived. Tap to stop the alarm.
